All right, welcome to the next video in the legacy coaching course. We are now going into power rankings. All right, so what are power rankings? Power rankings is a metric that we are going to use to identify how strong the value you are presenting to your clients are. So how much you can charge per member? Why is that important? Typically the more you can charge per member than that of your competition, the more you can pay to acquire new customers. So if your competition is doing the same thing as you or similar and you can charge a lot more for that service than they can, you're going to be able to spend a lot more to acquire new members, which is an infinite circle that allows your business to grow and scale while maintaining profitability. So usually the business who can pay the most to acquire new customers in the market will dominate, just used as an example, requires no additional expenses. So if you consistently add that revenue per member each month, you'll have an additional $48,000 in profit by the end of the year. And that's why we are going into trying to increase the revenue per member because so much of it comes down to profit. So the goal of the coaching program is to make gym lords as much profit as possible. So there are quite a few ways to increase your power ranking or revenue per member through increasing service or increasing product revenue, both of them. And your coach will show you exactly how to do that. And that's what this program is all about. We have multiple different plans on how to do that, how to boost up your power ranking and how to increase your revenue per member based on selling higher level services or commanding what you should be commanding for your services, and then following up with that and fulfilling that and retaining members at that new rate and also how to charge for products and be able to continually and recurrently have your members subscribe to those products. So super excited for you guys to dig into that.
